subcodes.title: Address to the Baha'is at Studio Hall  in Washington, 1912-04-21
subcodes.first_line: I have come here to visit you. With the greatest longing I have wished to see you. Realizing it was only with a great deal of trouble... In this cycle there shall be such progress along the lines of civilization
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual springtime, @coming-of-age; maturity of mankind, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @harmony of science and religion, @spiritual transformation
